title: Haise's Private Thruster Anomaly Note
description: A handwritten note found tucked into the LM systems manual — Haise's handwriting, dated two hours after the explosion. It reads: 'RCS Thruster B-4 reading 3% low on oxidizer pressure. Within spec. Monitoring. Not reported.' Below that, in fresher ink: 'Now 6% low. Still within spec. Will report if it crosses threshold.' The threshold is noted as 10%. The current reading, visible on the instrument panel, is 8.2%.
